title: BCI Metrics Envelope v1
description: BCI-derived entertainment metrics window for HorrorPlace VM-Constellation.

windowId.description: Identifier for the analysis window; should match the feature envelope when paired.

sessionId.description: Pseudonymous identifier for the recording session; must not be a dataset subject ID.

timestamp.description: Window start time in Unix seconds (may be fractional).

featureEnvelopeId.description: Optional reference to the originating feature envelope or NDJSON file identifier.

calibrationProfileId.description: Optional identifier for the calibration profile used to derive these metrics.

uecBand.description: Unsettling Emotional Content band, normalized to [0,1].

emdBand.description: Emerging Malevolence Dimension band, normalized to [0,1].

stciBand.description: Spectral Threat Concealment Index band, normalized to [0,1].

cdlBand.description: Cognitive Dissonance Level band, normalized to [0,1].

arrBand.description: Affective Resonance Ratio band, normalized to [0,1].

method.description: Method used to derive metrics from features.

smoothingAlpha.description: Optional alpha parameter when EMA or similar smoothing is used.

modelId.description: Optional identifier for the model used to compute metrics.

featureMappingVersion.description: Optional version string for the feature-to-metrics mapping spec.

detEstimate.description: Optional DET estimate for this window, aligned with invariants DET range.

overload.description: Flag indicating that BCI suggests the player is overloaded for this window.

underengaged.description: Flag indicating that BCI suggests the player is under-engaged for this window.
